reason: DROP COLUMN schedule.eventtypeid — the outgoing FK was dropped earlier via DropForeignKey in the same migration, but the DropForeignKey is a separate ALTER TABLE statement. Our per-op progressive schema should have caught this. Possible: the DropForeignKey statement uses AT_DropConstraint which our spec translates, but the constraint name may not match what we stored.
